news_title: Origin Agritech Announces Investment Agreements, Including Investment from Origin CEO Weibin Yan
summary: Origin Agritech (NASDAQ: SEED), a leading Chinese agricultural technology company, has secured significant investments totaling$3.88 million. CEO Weibin Yan personally invested$2.4 millionto acquire 2 million ordinary shares at$1.20 per share.The company also modified an existing agreement with institutional investors, consolidating remaining tranches into a single closing worth$1.48 millionat the same share price. These investments will fund Origin's expansion in China's agricultural biotechnology sector, supporting R&D, market penetration, and distribution network enhancement.
